_comment: Synthetic — player_theme_v1 extension declared with branding tokens. The interpreter MUST surface this on view.experience.player_theme; the theme/injector module reads it and writes CSS custom properties at boot. Per the platform CLAUDE.md and SPEC §7.1, the extension is plan-gated server-side (Pro+ creators get it; Free creators see player_theme stripped from the response). This fixture represents the Pro+ case.
name: Player Theme Extension Conformance Fixture
